creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
Hello,

On 09:30 Mon 02 Aug, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/mime-construct,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/149190 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/149190

thanks Frederic,

updated patch attached, committers please commit this one.


All the best,
-- 
Alexey V. Degtyarev
